description: Insecure use of storage refers to vulnerabilities that arise when storage variables are improperly managed. This can lead to: - Unauthorized access to sensitive data. - Loss of funds or data. - Exploitation of vulnerabilities in contract logic.
name: Insecure Use of Storage
remediation: - **Encrypt sensitive data:** Encrypt sensitive data before storing it. - **Validate inputs:** Ensure all storage updates are properly validated. - **Test thoroughly:** Conduct extensive testing to ensure storage is secure.
